import duckdb
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

products = pd.read_csv("/app/products.csv")
orders = pd.read_csv("/app/orders.csv", parse_dates=["order_date"])

con = duckdb.connect()
con.register('products', products)
con.register('orders', orders)

query = """
WITH q4_orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM orders 
    WHERE order_date BETWEEN '2024-10-01' AND '2024-12-31'
),
product_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.category,
        o.product_id,
        SUM(o.quantity * o.unit_price) AS total_sales
    FROM q4_orders o
    JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.category, o.product_id
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        category,
        product_id,
        total_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS rn
    FROM product_sales
)
SELECT category, product_id, total_sales
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY category, rn;
"""

result = con.execute(query).df()
print(result.head(20))
print("\nNumber of rows:", len(result))
print("Categories present:", result['category'].unique())
print("\nCheck per category count:")
print(result.groupby('category').size())

import duckdb
import pandas as pd

products = pd.read_csv("/app/products.csv")
orders = pd.read_csv("/app/orders.csv", parse_dates=["order_date"])

con = duckdb.connect()
con.register('products', products)
con.register('orders', orders)

query = """
WITH q4_orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM orders 
    WHERE order_date BETWEEN '2024-10-01' AND '2024-12-31'
),
product_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.category,
        o.product_id,
        SUM(o.quantity * o.unit_price) AS total_sales
    FROM q4_orders o
    JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY p.category, o.product_id
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        category,
        product_id,
        total_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS rn
    FROM product_sales
)
SELECT category, product_id, total_sales
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY category, rn;
"""

result = con.execute(query).df()
print(result.head(20))
print("\nNumber of rows:", len(result))
print("Categories present:", result['category'].unique())
print("\nCheck per category count:")
print(result.groupby('category').size())
